benefit_text:
64 Brattle Street, Cambridge, Massachusetts, 02138
                                                            
    Map
617-547-8300
SELECT SHOWS - The A.R.T. makes passes available to select performances of select shows. Availability will be determined 30 days before the start of each performance's run.
Next show: Black Swan, May 29 - June 28, 2026
Each pass admits 2 people for free for either a Friday 7:30 pm performance or a Sunday 2:00 pm performance.
After booking, you will receive an email confirmation with instructions on how to contact A.R.T. Ticket Services for your electronic tickets. Please note that you must contact them no later than 5:00 pm two days before your selected performance.
NOTE: Black Swan is recommended for at least ages 14 and older and has content warnings for self-injury/harm, sex, haze, flashing lights/strobe, and loud sudden noises. For more information, please visit: https://americanrepertorytheater.org/shows-events/black-swan/
Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
